name: Italian Soft Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs well and blend in sugar, melted shortening, and flavorings.
2. Sift flour and baking powder and add to mixture to make a soft dough. If too sticky, add a bit more flour for a soft dough.
3. Shape into 2 large fat long rolls and flatten tops with finger tips.
4. Place each roll on a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes or until light golden.
6. Cool, frost, and slice diagonally.
7. For frosting, mix a little milk and confectioners sugar to make a thin frosting.
8. Brush over the rolls with a pastry brush and sprinkle with colored jimmies.
9. Cut when cold.
